meaning: n.塞子,制动器,阻塞物,制止者v.塞住
examples: Not having the necessary capital right now is not a show stopper.
While in the kitchen, Susan turns around and sees a crime stopper style show on television.
Ratliff has been primarily a defensive stopper in his 15 years in the NBA, even earning All-Star honors in 2001.
As Mr. de Jesus notes, every cork stopper contains a remarkable 800 million cells.
Bolton's Jussi Jaaskelainen and Hearts stopper Antti Niemi will probably be given half a game each in goal.
